title: Job Interview: Tell Me About Yourself
description: Practice the most common interview question with structured responses.

dialogue_nodes.content: Welcome to the interview! Let's start with a common question: Can you tell me about yourself?
That's a great start! Let me give you some tips on how to structure your response better.

title: At the Airport: Checking In
description: Learn essential phrases for airport check-in conversations.

dialogue_nodes.content: Good morning! Welcome to the check-in counter. May I see your passport and booking confirmation?
Thank you. Would you prefer a window seat or an aisle seat?

title: Doctor's Visit: Describing Symptoms
description: Practice describing your symptoms clearly to a doctor.

dialogue_nodes.content: Hello, I'm Dr. Smith. What brings you in today?
I see. How long have you been experiencing these symptoms?

title: Making Friends: Introducing Yourself at a Party
description: Learn to make small talk and introduce yourself confidently.

dialogue_nodes.content: Hi there! I don't think we've met. I'm Jamie. Are you a friend of the host?
Nice to meet you! So what do you do for a living?

title: Meeting Kickoff: Project Status Update
description: Practice leading a meeting and presenting project updates.

dialogue_nodes.content: Good morning everyone. Let's get started with our weekly sync. Who'd like to go first?
Thanks for that update. Any blockers we should discuss?

title: Restaurant: Ordering Food
description: Practice ordering food and making special requests at a restaurant.

dialogue_nodes.content: Welcome! Here's the menu. Are you ready to order, or do you need a few more minutes?
Great choice! Would you like any sides with that?
